title: DynamoDB Single-Table Design
description: Master DynamoDB single-table design principles for complex relational modeling. Implement efficient data access patterns using Partition Keys, Sort Keys, and Global Secondary Indexes to achieve sub-10ms performance.
objectives: Master DynamoDB single-table design principles for complex relational modeling.
Implement efficient data access patterns using Partition Keys, Sort Keys, and Global Secondary Indexes to achieve sub-10ms performance.
